steps: Go to https://app.cal.com and log in (or create a free account at https://cal.com/signup)
Alternatively: go to Settings > Security > scroll down to the Developer section and click 'API Keys'
Give the key a name and optionally set an expiration date
Click 'Save' — the API key is shown immediately
Copy the key now — it will not be displayed again after you close the dialog

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Cal.com API key, sent in the Authorization header as 'Bearer <api_key>'

notes: Free plan available; some API features require a paid plan
API key is shown only once at creation — copy it immediately
Test mode keys have prefix 'cal_' and live keys have prefix 'cal_live_'
Rate limit is 120 requests per minute by default
The Cal.com API v2 base URL is https://api.cal.com/v2

test_endpoint.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information
